about_dialog.title: About ESFEX
about_dialog.text:
v{version}

License: Apache License 2.0

Authors: {author}

Host Institution: Hiroshima University, Japan

plugins_dialog.title: Plugin Manager
plugins_dialog.name: Name
plugins_dialog.author: Author
plugins_dialog.restart_notice: Plugin changes take effect on next studio launch.
plugins_dialog.confirm_uninstall: Uninstall plugin "{name}"? This will delete its directory.

auto_complete.title: Auto-Complete Network
auto_complete.summary: Found {n} disconnected equipment on {g} buses to connect
auto_complete.no_isolated: No isolated elements found. All equipment is connected to the main network.
auto_complete.success: Successfully connected {n} buses to the network.
auto_complete.info: For each disconnected bus: creates a transformer + transmission line to the nearest existing network bus. Capacity = equipment rated power × 1.2.

properties.title: Properties
properties.empty: Select an element to view its properties.

node_form.name: Name:
node_form.forecast_tip: Forecast (and distribute) demand for this node without running the whole Grid Builder.
node_form.view_demand_disabled: This node has no forecasted/loaded demand yet

generator_form.name: Name:
generator_form.availability_browse_tooltip: Browse for an availability CSV (hourly profile, values 0-1)

battery_form.name: Name:
battery_form.throughput_degradation_tooltip: Degradation cost per MWh discharged. Represents battery wear from cycling (typical: Li-ion ~5, flow ~2, lead-acid ~15 $/MWh).

line_form.confirm_delete_msg:
Delete transmission line '{line_id}'?
This cannot be undone.

zone_form.name: Name:
zone_form.tech_empty_hint: None selected = auto-match by zone technology name
zone_form.exclusive_tooltip: When enabled, selected technologies can ONLY invest at this zone. Investment at original nodes is set to zero.
zone_form.confirm_delete_msg:
Delete zone '{name}'?
This cannot be undone.

transformer_form.name: Name:
transformer_form.draw_lines_hint: Draw transmission lines to connect equipment

acdc_form.draw_lines_hint: Draw transmission lines to connect equipment

freq_form.draw_lines_hint: Draw transmission lines to connect equipment
freq_form.name: Name:

bus_form.name: Name:
bus_form.slack_warn_body: A bus is already designated as slack: "{names}". A power network uses a single reference (slack) bus. If you keep more than one, the solver will use only the first one it finds. Consider changing the other to PQ or PV.

fuel_storage_form.select_fuel_hint: Select a fuel to edit its parameters

fuel_route_form.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this fuel transport route?

fuel_form.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this fuel?

technology_form.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this technology?

investment_form.populate_tip: Copy existing & max investment capacities from node technologies
investment_form.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this investment configuration?

electrolyzer_form.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this electrolyzer?
electrolyzer_form.name: Name:

global_form.title: Global Settings
global_form.n1_scopf_tip: Replace preventive N-1 reserves with iterative Security-Constrained OPF. Only binding contingency constraints are added, reducing problem size.
global_form.n1_corrective_tip: Allow post-contingency battery and generator re-dispatch instead of reserving preventive capacity. Less conservative but more realistic for storage-rich systems.
global_form.n1_pi_tip: Performance Index threshold for contingency screening. 0 = no screening (analyze all). Higher values filter low-impact contingencies.
global_form.n1_transformer_ctg_tip: Include transformer outages in N-1 contingency analysis.
global_form.n1_battery_ctg_tip: Include battery/storage outages in N-1 analysis. Discharging batteries act as generation loss.
global_form.analysis_panel.nk_pi_tip: Performance Index threshold for screening. 0 = no screening (analyze all contingencies).

stochastic_form.title: Scenarios
stochastic_form.select_multipliers_msg: Select one or more cost multipliers to add:
stochastic_form.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete scenario '{name}'?
stochastic_form.invalid_mult_msg: One or more multipliers already exist.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.reset_all_confirm_msg: Reset all preferences to factory defaults? This cannot be undone.
preferences.lang_restart_msg: Language change will take effect after restarting the application.

validation.title: Network Validation
validation.simplify_tip: Remove dead-end buses, stub lines, and unused fuel elements
validation.select_at_least_one: Select at least one validation category.
validation.summary_ok: No issues found — network is valid.
validation.infra_tip: Analyze and suggest merging similar generators/batteries (same fuel and technology) into aggregate units
validation.infra_applied_msg: Applied {n} simplification(s). Re-run validation to see updated results.
validation.infra_none_checked: No suggestions checked. Check the ones you want to apply.
validation.infra_no_groups: No mergeable groups found at this scope.

sensitivity.title: Global Sensitivity Analysis (Sobol)
sensitivity.no_kpis_msg: Select at least one output KPI.
sensitivity.no_lp_msg: Browse for an LP file first.

script_editor.save_as_tip: Save current script to a new file
script_editor.file_menu_tip: File actions (New, Open, Save, Save As)

geo_parse.title: Parse Geo Asset: {name}
geo_parse.select_system_prompt: Which system should receive parsed elements?

messages.export_project_missing:
Some referenced files were not found and were left out of the bundle:
{files}
messages.import_project_dest: Choose a folder to extract the project into
messages.no_nodes_msg: Line endpoints must connect to existing nodes.
messages.invalid_route_msg: Cannot resolve endpoint to a node.
messages.confirm_split_msg: Do you want to connect '{element}' to '{line}'?
messages.no_systems_in_config: The selected config file contains no systems.
messages.name_conflict_prompt: System '{name}' already exists. Enter a new name:
messages.missing_dep_pandas:
pandas is required to load CSV files.
Install it with: pip install pandas
messages.column_mismatch_msg: Node index is {idx} but file only has {cols} columns.
messages.hour_mismatch_msg:
Loaded file has {n1} hours but node '{name}' (index {idx}) already has {n2} hours.
All nodes must share the same number of hours.

wizard_solar.title: Solar Rooftop Analysis
wizard_solar.domain_instruction: Define the analysis domain by drawing a rectangle on the map or entering coordinates manually.
wizard_solar.draw_status: Drawing... click and drag on the map.
wizard_solar.invalid_domain_msg: North must be > South and East must be > West.
wizard_solar.config_summary: Configure inputs in previous steps, then run analysis.
wizard_solar.analysis_complete:
Analysis complete!
  Suitable buildings: {suitable}/{total}
  Total capacity: {capacity:.1f} kWp
  Annual yield: {yield:.1f} MWh/yr
  Avg capacity factor: {cf:.1f}%
wizard_solar.select_turbine: Select a turbine from the table above to see its details.
wizard_solar.macro_instruction: Configure macroeconomic parameters for adoption modeling. Use 'Fetch All' to auto-download data from World Bank, IMF and IRENA, or enter values manually.
wizard_solar.macro_no_bounds: No domain defined. Go back to Step 1 first.
wizard_solar.macro_no_iso: Enter a valid ISO country code (e.g. CUB, USA).
wizard_solar.adopt_instruction: Select adoption modeling methods and run the analysis. Each method produces a year-by-year adoption curve.
wizard_solar.adopt_no_methods: Select at least one modeling method.
wizard_solar.adopt_no_macro: No macroeconomic data. Complete Step 6 first.
wizard_solar.compare_instruction: Compare adoption curves from different methods. Select the curve to use for model integration.
wizard_solar.compare_no_matplotlib: matplotlib not installed — cannot display chart.
wizard_solar.integ_instruction: Apply the selected adoption curve to the ESFEX model or export data files for external use.
wizard_solar.integ_apply_desc: Write adoption parameters into the current rooftop solar configuration and enable simulation.
wizard_solar.adopt_manual_instruction: Enter year and observed installed capacity (MW):

wizard_wind.title: Wind Resource Assessment
wizard_wind.domain_instruction: Define the analysis domain by drawing a rectangle on the map or entering coordinates manually.
wizard_wind.load_oedb_tip:
Download turbine data from the Open Energy Database
(100+ additional turbine models, requires internet)
wizard_wind.select_turbine: Select a turbine from the table above to see its details.
wizard_wind.hub_height_tip:
Override the default hub height from the turbine database.
Leave at the turbine's default or adjust for your specific site.
wizard_wind.workers_tip:
Number of parallel threads for data fetching and computation.
0 = Auto (uses all available CPU cores).
wizard_wind.min_cf_tip: Minimum capacity factor for a site to be considered feasible
wizard_wind.method_manual_desc: Manually assign weights to each criterion. Weights will be normalized to sum to 1.
wizard_wind.method_entropy_desc: Weights computed automatically from data using Shannon entropy. Criteria with more variation get higher weights.
wizard_wind.method_pca_desc: Weights derived from first principal component loadings. Criteria that explain most variance get higher weights.
wizard_wind.no_criteria_msg: At least one criterion must be enabled.
wizard_wind.config_summary: Configure domain and parameters before running.
wizard_wind.cds_api_msg:
ERA5 wind data download requires a Copernicus Climate Data Store account.

1. Register at: https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/
2. Go to your profile page and copy your API key
3. Create the file ~/.cdsapirc with:

   url: https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/api
   key: YOUR_UID:YOUR_API_KEY

Then retry the analysis.
wizard_wind.turbine_required_msg: Please select a turbine from the database.
wizard_wind.no_feasible_msg: No feasible sites for zone generation.
wizard_wind.zone_detail: {id}: {area:.1f} km², {sites} sites, avg CF {cf:.3f}, avg MCDA {mcda:.3f}, {capacity:.1f} MW
wizard_wind.no_zones_msg:
No development zones generated.
Try lowering the capacity factor threshold.
wizard_wind.zones_added: {n} wind development zone(s) added to the system.
wizard_wind.char_no_data: No hourly wind data available. Complete Phase A analysis first.
wizard_wind.avail_instruction: Generate hourly capacity factor profiles (8760 values) for wind generators based on their geographic position using Phase A meteorological data. Profiles are saved as CSV and assigned to generators in the model.
wizard_wind.avail_no_generators: No wind generators found in the model. Add generators with fuel type 'Wind' in the studio.
wizard_wind.avail_no_data: No Phase A data available. Profiles will be fetched from external API (slower).
wizard_wind.avail_done_msg: Generated {n} availability profile(s) and updated the model.

wizard_solar_pv.title: Solar PV Potential Assessment
wizard_solar_pv.domain_desc: Define the analysis domain by drawing a rectangle on the map or entering coordinates manually.
wizard_solar_pv.domain_required_msg: Please define a domain first by drawing a rectangle or entering coordinates.
wizard_solar_pv.module_required_msg: Please select a PV module from the database.
wizard_solar_pv.criteria_desc: Configure the multi-criteria decision analysis (MCDA) for evaluating solar PV development zones.
wizard_solar_pv.no_criteria_msg: At least one criterion must be enabled.
wizard_solar_pv.config_summary: Configure domain and parameters before running.
wizard_solar_pv.workers_tip:
Number of parallel threads for data fetching and computation.
0 = Auto (uses all available CPU cores).
wizard_solar_pv.char_no_data: No hourly data available. Complete Phase A analysis first.
wizard_solar_pv.avail_instruction: Generate hourly capacity factor profiles (8760 values) for solar PV generators based on their geographic position using Phase A irradiance data. Profiles are saved as CSV and assigned to generators in the model.
wizard_solar_pv.avail_no_generators: No solar PV generators found in the model. Add generators with fuel type 'Sun' in the studio.
wizard_solar_pv.avail_no_data: No Phase A data available. Profiles will be fetched from external API (slower).
wizard_solar_pv.avail_done_msg: Generated {n} availability profile(s) and updated the model.

electrical.inherited_tooltip: Automatically inherited from the connected bus

wizard_demand.title: Demand Distribution Analysis
wizard_demand.step1_instruction: Select the target nodes whose demand will be distributed among their existing busbars.
wizard_demand.need_two_buses: Node needs at least 2 buses for demand distribution.
wizard_demand.step2_instruction: Define the geographic area and fetch building footprints.
wizard_demand.drawing_status: Draw a rectangle on the map...
wizard_demand.invalid_domain_msg: North must be > South and East must be > West.
wizard_demand.step3_instruction: Configure building classification rules. Weights are relative and used to proportion each node's actual demand.
wizard_demand.no_buildings: No buildings loaded. Go back to Step 2.
wizard_demand.weight_info: These weights are relative values used to proportionally distribute each node's actual demand among its busbars. They do not represent absolute demand.
wizard_demand.step4_instruction: Run spatial clustering to group buildings into demand zones.
wizard_demand.no_classified: No classified buildings. Go back to Step 3.
wizard_demand.step5_instruction: Review the per-node mapping of clusters to existing busbars. Fractions are auto-normalized to sum exactly 1.0. Click 'Apply to Model' to update demand fractions.

wizard_ev.title: EV & V2G Assessment
wizard_ev.domain_instruction: Define the study area and enter baseline vehicle fleet data.
wizard_ev.no_domain: Please define the study area first.
wizard_ev.no_country: Country not detected. Define study area first.
wizard_ev.no_methods: Select at least one adoption method.
wizard_ev.select_scenario: Select the preferred adoption scenario for V2G analysis.
wizard_ev.charging_instruction: Generate and compare three charging demand scenarios.
wizard_ev.no_demand_loaded: No base demand loaded (synthetic will be used)
wizard_ev.v2g_instruction: Configure V2G parameters and assess technical potential.
wizard_ev.connected_hint: Values 0.0-1.0: fraction of fleet connected to charger each hour.
wizard_ev.no_fleet_data: No fleet data available. Complete previous steps.
wizard_ev.grid_instruction: Assess the impact of EV charging and V2G on the power grid.
wizard_ev.integration_instruction: Review and apply the generated EV configuration.
wizard_ev.no_model_tooltip: No model loaded — open a configuration first.
wizard_ev.applied_success: EV configuration applied to model successfully!

demand_visualizer.no_data: No demand data for this node.
demand_visualizer.no_webengine: Web engine unavailable; cannot render charts.
